message:
fix(fwc): migrate serve_mcp and new_cmd tests from tokio to fcp-async-core

Replace #[tokio::test] with #[fcp_async_core::runtime::test] in
serve_mcp.rs (12 tests) and apply clippy formatting fixes to new_cmd.rs
(clone_on_copy, line width).
